candidates.why: This is the explicit total revenue/top-line figure in the income statement.

candidates.row_label: Accrued revenues at the point in time
candidates.why: This is a balance sheet accrual, not total revenue.
Explicitly labeled non-revenue, so not suitable for total revenue.
This is the main production input cost and best represents cost of goods sold.
Could be part of COGS but is a narrower component; primary COGS is better captured by materials and consumables used.
Appears smaller and more specific; likely a subcomponent of material costs rather than the main COGS line.
Balance sheet inventory item, not a period expense.
This is income, not an expense, so it should not be included in SG&A expenses.

candidates.row_label: Stock-Based Compensation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Explicitly identified as SG&A stock-based compensation, a classic SG&A component.
A broad operating expense bucket that likely includes SG&A-type overhead when no explicit SG&A total is given.
These are overhead operating costs and fit within SG&A-type expenses.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Brands, Patents, Trademarks, Marketing & Artistic Intangibles - Supplemental
candidates.why: This is amortization of intangibles, which should be excluded from SG&A per instructions.

final_choice.row_label: Stock-Based Compensation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses

candidates.row_label: Amortization excluding Goodwill in Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: Amortization specifically within R&D expenses represents R&D-related expense for the period.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: Explicit amortization of capitalized R&D; also an R&D expense component.
Balance sheet asset, not current-period R&D expense.
Represents capitalized R&D asset, not the expense flow.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Costs - Accumulated Amortization & Impairment
candidates.why: Contra-asset/accumulated amount, not the current-period expense.

final_choice.row_label: Amortization excluding Goodwill in Research & Development Expenses
Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental

candidates.why: This is the primary interest expense line and best matches the interest expense target.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Interest on lease liabilities is part of interest but more specific; guidelines prefer the main interest expense line when available.

candidates.row_label: Net interest cost of pension obligations
candidates.why: Interest component of pensions; secondary to the main interest expense line.
Represents profit attribution, not interest.
Represents profit attribution, not interest.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental detail of lease interest; main interest expense line is preferred.
Balance sheet derivative item, not interest expense.
Debt principal, not interest expense.
Debt principal, not interest expense.
Equity attribution, not interest.
Equity attribution, not interest.
Represents net income attributable, not the stock of equity on the balance sheet.
Represents comprehensive income attribution, not total equity balance.
Appears to relate to affiliates, not total shareholders’ equity.
This is the total shareholders’ equity on the balance sheet and matches book equity definition.
Balancing/plug line, not the true equity total.
Explicitly a balancing item, not the actual equity amount.
Balancing/plug line, not the actual equity total.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing/plug, not the equity figure itself.
Includes both liabilities and equity; not pure equity.
Represents the income attributable to non-controlling interests, but the balance sheet provides the equity amount which is preferable for MIB.
Duplicate labeling of non-controlling interests on the income statement; again, balance sheet figure is preferable.
This is the non-controlling interests component of equity, which matches the minority interest definition for MIB.
Appears to duplicate non-controlling interests, but the primary label used is Non-controlling Interests; either would work, but we choose the clearer term.
